subcodes.first_line: O well-beloved friend! Thy cherished letter was perused. It was an expression of truth in most eloquent language [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دلبر آفاقک مفتونی نامه نامیلری مطالعه اولندی بیان حقیقت ایدی لسان فصاحت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @role and station of women, @spiritual transformation
